subcodes.first_line: That which is beloved in the sight of God is His recognition and steadfastness in His Cause. Whosoever hath attained thereunto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه لدی الله محبوبست عرفان او و استقامت بر امر او است هر نفسی بان فائز شد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
